历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 5108 → 5324 → 5650 → 7061 → 10774, showing a continuous backward trend overall. Especially after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the ranking declined more rapidly. In 2025, it dropped by about 3713 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5666 places in the last two years, indicating significantly intensified competition. The 2025 baseline is approximately 10774. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi Province was 89 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 113 in 2024, and 105 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan is 92, a reduction of 13 students (-12.4%) compared to 2025. This reduction has a downward effect on rankings (making it easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 21st in 2021 and remained stable at 22nd from 2022 to 2026, with no recent change in ranking. It is a top-tier comprehensive university nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (lingering effects of the study partner incident). On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention from applicants. From 2022 to 2024, abnormal admission signals persisted (e.g., a break in Shaanxi, a sharp 63-point drop in the admission line in Sichuan), which have a lagging psychological impact on applicants. With 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Foreign Languages and Literature, A in Control Science and Engineering, and A in Marxist Theory, the university has strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communications (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) continue to be highly popular, closely matching Shandong University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,480), leading to slightly intensified competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university for Jiangxi. For Jiangxi candidates, it is an out-of-province university with no local admission preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 12.4% reduction in physics category enrollment in 2026 (downward pressure on rankings), a slight increase in total candidates, and the somewhat negative school reputation, the reduction effect slightly dominates. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025 (making it easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9923, with a range of 9423 to 10423.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9423–10423, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<9423), you can focus on reaching for top programs like (5+3) and Mathematics. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>10423), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety. Shandong University has strong engineering capabilities, with Mathematics A+ being top in the country. It is recommended to prioritize advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University recruits separately for medical programs in Jiangxi Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 17965, 20257, 18754, 18982, and 18502 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 17965 to 20257. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 17 students in 2021, expanded to 23 in 2022, reduced to 20 in 2023, further reduced to 17 in 2024, and further reduced to 14 in 2025, showing a year-by-year contraction trend. The 2026 plan continues to shrink to 10 students (a decrease of 4 from 2025, a drop of about 28.6%), mainly due to the cancellation of the Pharmacy category (which enrolled 4 students in 2025), while Nursing remains unchanged at 6 students and Clinical Medicine remains unchanged at 4 students. The significant reduction in the plan affects the overall competitive landscape, but the contraction is concentrated in mid-to-high-score majors, having a relatively moderate impact on the minimum ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. It has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical disciplines have a long history and outstanding reputation. Its Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, and other majors are well-known nationwide and have sustained appeal to candidates in Jiangxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine facing particularly intense competition. Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, an eastern coastal province with a superior geographical location, which strongly attracts candidates from Jiangxi Province. The scale of medical enrollment within Jiangxi Province is limited, and as an out-of-province 985 university, Shandong University's medical programs have a small enrollment plan in Jiangxi, further intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant reduction in the 2026 medical enrollment plan but with the contraction concentrated in mid-to-high-score majors, unchanged Nursing enrollment, recent ranking fluctuation trends, and the popularity of medical studies, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical programs in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 15530, a decrease compared to 2025 (easier to enter), with a fluctuation range expected between 15030 and 16030.

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
